{ "name": "word-wrap", "description": "Wrap words to a specified length.", "version": "1.2.5", "homepage": "https://github.com/jonschlinkert/word-wrap", "author": "Jon Schlinkert (https://github.com/jonschlinkert)", "contributors": [ "Danilo Sampaio <danilo.sampaio@gmail.com> (localhost:8080)", "Fede Ramirez <i@2fd.me> (https://2fd.github.io)", "Joe Hildebrand <joe-github@cursive.net> (https://twitter.com/hildjj)", "Jon Schlinkert <jon.schlinkert@sellside.com> (http://twitter.com/jonschlinkert)", "Todd Kennedy (https://tck.io)", "Waldemar Reusch (https://github.com/lordvlad)", "Wolfgang Faust (http://www.linestarve.com)", "Zach Hale <zachhale@gmail.com> (http://zachhale.com)" ], "repository": "jonschlinkert/word-wrap", "bugs": { "url": "https://github.com/jonschlinkert/word-wrap/issues" }, "license": "MIT", "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts" ], "main": "index.js", "engines": { "node": ">=0.10.0" }, "scripts": { "test": "mocha" }, "devDependencies": { "gulp-format-md": "^0.1.11", "mocha": "^3.2.0" }, "keywords": [ "break", "carriage", "line", "new-line", "newline", "return", "soft", "text", "word", "word-wrap", "words", "wrap" ], "typings": "index.d.ts", "verb": { "toc": false, "layout": "default", "tasks": [ "readme" ], "plugins": [ "gulp-format-md" ], "lint": { "reflinks": true }, "related": { "list": [ "common-words", "shuffle-words", "unique-words", "wordcount" ] }, "reflinks": [ "verb", "verb-generate-readme" ] } }
